assembly.subtitle: Nice to meet you!
assembly.title: Who are we?
assembly.descExpanded: We're the Bruijninckx family, from the congregation in Wavre, Belgium. So happy to welcome you to our home!
belgium.subtitle: Quick guide
belgium.title: Discover Belgium
belgium.atomium: Icon of Expo 58, this iron crystal magnified 165 billion times towers over the Brussels skyline. A must-see!
belgium.chocoDesc: Pralines, ganache and artisan truffles — a craft passed down through generations. With over 2,000 chocolatiers, every bite is a journey.
belgium.friesDesc: Forget "French fries" — here it's the Belgian fry! The secret? Double frying in beef tallow. Crispy outside, melt-in-your-mouth inside.
gallery.subtitle: Snapshots
gallery.title: Family Album
gallery.uploadDesc: Drop a photo here or click to browse (Max 32 MB)
belgium.beerDesc: Over 1,500 varieties brewed with passion. Belgian beer culture has been a UNESCO Intangible Heritage since 2016.
belgium.comicsDesc: From Tintin to the Smurfs to Lucky Luke — Belgium gave comic books their claim to fame.
belgium.artDesc: From Magritte to Delvaux, surrealism runs through Belgium's veins. "Everything we see hides something else."
belgium.factFooter: ...are all Belgian inventions! Small country, big ideas.
contact.subtitle: Got a question?
contact.title: Don't hesitate!
footer.love: Made with ❤️ by DualsFWShield
